mapper.select: SELECT id, course_id, section_title, section_content, section_type, duration, sort_order, is_free, is_published FROM osh_course_section WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT id, course_id, section_title, section_content, section_type, duration, sort_order, is_free, is_published FROM osh_course_section WHERE id = #{sectionId} AND delete_flag = 0

SELECT s.id AS section_id, s.course_id, s.title, s.media_url, s.cover, s.duration, s.video_codec, s.video_bitrate, s.video_resolution, s.file_size, s.subtitle_url, s.type, s.is_free, s.status, s.exam_id, c.title AS course_name, c.price, c.status AS course_status FROM osh_course_section s LEFT JOIN osh_coures c ON s.course_id = c.id WHERE s.id = #{sectionId} AND s.delete_flag = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM osh_course_section WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND delete_flag = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO osh_course_section ( course_id, parent_id, title, sort, is_free, type, duration, media_url, cover, video_codec, video_bitrate, video_resolution, file_size, subtitle_url, status, exam_id, create_time ) VALUES ( #{courseId}, #{parentId}, #{title}, #{sort}, #{isFree}, #{sectionType}, #{duration}, #{mediaUrl}, #{cover}, #{videoCodec}, #{videoBitrate}, #{videoResolution}, #{fileSize}, #{subtitleUrl}, #{status}, #{examId}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO osh_course_section ( course_id, parent_id, title, sort, is_free, section_type, duration, media_url, cover, video_codec, video_bitrate, video_resolution, subtitle_url, status, exam_id, create_by, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{courseId}, #{parentId}, #{title}, #{sort}, #{isFree}, #{sectionType}, #{duration}, #{mediaUrl}, #{cover}, #{videoCodec}, #{videoBitrate}, #{videoResolution}, #{subtitleUrl}, #{status}, #{examId}, #{createBy}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.delete: UPDATE osh_course_section SET delete_flag = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE osh_course_section SET delete_flag = 1 WHERE course_id = #{courseId}
